ford_ka_plus_job_note_bd6e814abd.text: Transpondery lists Ford Ka/Ka+ 2016+ as Hitag Pro ID47. Silca independently lists Ka+ 2016-2019 with HU101, 433 MHz and ID47. Exact Ford part number and operation-level tool IDs still need mapping.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
